final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for an automotive product launch announcement (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "通透震撼" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple product launch keynote slides, Porsche automotive photography heritage, contemporary Chinese automotive brand visual systems; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include primary title centered or left-aligned, secondary subtitle positioned below or adjacent
Subject: must include the vehicle "长安起源Q06" as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: needs an immersive, expansive backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a "震撼" atmosphere with luminous transparency — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a brand-appropriate direction aligned with Changan brand identity — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished, premium surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06将于9月上市" (split as main title and subtitle per composition)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve the product name "长安起源Q06" and launch timing "9月上市"
Avoid:
